name: Spicy Lentil Stew (Yemiser W'et)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green peas, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the lentils and cook them according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
2. Reserve some vegetable stock for later use in the recipe.
3. Heat ghee in a large pot over medium heat. Add onions and garlic, and sauté until onions are translucent.
4. Stir in Berbere, ground cumin, and paprika. Sauté for a few minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
5. Add chopped tomatoes and tomato paste. Simmer the mixture for 10 minutes.
6. Gradually add the reserved vegetable stock and continue simmering.
7. When the lentils are cooked, stir them into the pot. Add green peas and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve with Injera bread or pita bread.
"Sundays at Moosewood Restaurant"
